features: All-In-One VR Solution: The VIVE Focus series offers standalone and PC VR experiences; Harness the power of virtual reality with ideal-resolution displays, versatile tracking features, and immersive applications; Base station-free
PC VR Gaming Headset: Immerse in low-latency VIVEPORT andSteamVR gameplay; DisplayPort mode delivers lossless, ideal-fidelity visuals straight from your PC
Make Interactions Real: Connect in VRChat like never before; With built-in eye and low-light, hand tracking plus face and body tracker support, movement in VR is intuitive and lifelike
Immersive 5k Headset Display: The immersive display puts you right at the heart of the action with a 5K resolution of 2448 x 2448 pixels per eye, up to 120° field of view, and 90 Hz refresh rate
Personalize Your Fit: Auto-IPD adjustment aligns the XR headset's lenses with the centers of your pupils, giving your eyes the clearest, most comfortable viewing experience
3D Spatial Audio: Hearing is believing; Get 3D audio with open-back, dual-driver speakers that minimize sound leakage, noise- and echo-cancelling mics, and a 3.5 mm audio jack
Mixed Reality Environment: Scene understanding powered by a depth sensor lets you virtually interact with physical objects and surfaces in your environment

Uninterrupted Gaming: Play VR for longer thanks to the hot-swappable battery, a reserve front battery sustains power long enough for you to swap out the main battery with a spare which takes just seconds
Expand Your Workspace: Explore a new dimension of productivity with spatial computing; Tools like VIVE Desk let you visualize, create, and multitask in mixed reality
description: From the manufacturer PC VR streaming (DisplayPort mode compatible) Get in the game. Immerse yourself in low-latency VIVEPORT and SteamVR gameplay. DisplayPort mode delivers lossless, high-fidelity visuals straight from your PC. High-fidelity graphics Immersive 5k headset display. The immersive display puts you right at the heart of the action with a 5K resolution of 2448 x 2448 pixels per eye, up to 120° field of view, and 90 Hz refresh rate. 3D Spatial Audio Hearing is believing. Get 3D audio with open-back, dual-driver speakers that minimize sound leakage, noise- and echo-cancelling mics, and a 3.5 mm audio jack. Hot-swappable battery Power on, stay on. Play VR for longer thanks to the hot-swappable battery. A reserve front battery sustains power long enough for you to swap out the main battery with a spare — which takes just seconds. Active cooling system. Keep your cool. The cooling system actively dissipates heat via a fan with 30% more air intake than VIVE Focus 3’s — letting you and the headset stay focused on the VR. Lightweight alloy frame Reinforced design. Get durability and stability with VIVE Focus Vision’s reinforced body. Has a tough yet lightweight magnesium alloy frame plus a metal loop for securing the top strap. Expanded motion tracking. Make interactions real. Connect in VRChat like never before. With built-in eye and low-light hand tracking plus face and body tracker support, movement in VR is intuitive and lifelike.[2,3,8] Built-in eye tracking Your vision leads the way. Using infrared illuminators, cameras, and computer vision, eye tracking offers gaze input, avatar eye control, and optimized performance via foveated rendering.[2] Motorized auto IPD Personalize your fit. Auto-IPD adjustment enabled by eye-tracking technology aligns the XR headset’s lenses with the centers of your pupils, giving your eyes the clearest, most comfortable viewing experience.[4] Infrared floodlight Low-light hand tracking. An infrared floodlight and 4 cameras support illuminated hand tracking with 26-point precision. Control VR through simple gestures in even dim spaces.[3] Balance and comfort A visionary design. Enjoy an ergonomic fit you can tighten or loosen using the rear dial. Offers balanced front and back weight, cleanable cushions, and a top strap for support. It even accommodates glasses.[12] Patented, quick-release button Easy off, easy on. Whenever you want a break, press the proprietary quick release behind the battery case to instantly loosen and take off the VR headset. Three configurable virtual displays Expand your workspace. Explore a new dimension of productivity with spatial computing. Tools like VIVE Desk let you visualize, create, and multitask in mixed reality.[7] Depth-correct mixed reality Your portal to mixed reality. VIVE Focus Vision brings the virtual and real worlds together for new immersive experiences in work and play. Stereo, full-color passthrough True-to-life spatial awareness. Two high-resolution cameras enable stereo color passthrough, revealing a vivid, depth-correct view of your surroundings. Integrated depth sensor Scene understanding. Powered by a depth sensor, scene understanding lets you virtually interact with physical objects and surfaces in your environment.[5] Previous page Next page headset and VR/MR titles each sold separately. Latency and visual quality of VR/MR content are dependent on PC specs, software settings, and network connection. To connect to a PC via DisplayPort, VIVE Focus Vision also requires VIVE Wired Streaming Cable (DisplayPort mode compatible) and VIVE Wired Streaming Converter (DisplayPort mode compatible), both of which are included in VIVE Wired Streaming Kit (DisplayPort mode compatible). VIVE Wired Streaming Kit sold separately. 2. Content compatibility required. Please check the specifications to ensure the content supports eye tracking and related functions like foveated rendering. Performance may vary by title or application and may be affected by eye surgery, eye disease, heavy makeup, and/or high myopia. 3. Hand tracking features are VR title dependent. Check the VR title's description for compatible inputs or use a filtered search for hand tracking-enabled content. 4. The precision of the auto-IPD adjustment may vary from user to user. 5. Depth-sensing-enabled features are limited to indoor environments. Available virtual interactions using scene understanding are dependent on content compatibility. 6. The front internal battery is only intended to sustain power long enough for the rear battery to be swapped with a freshly charged VIVE Battery for Focus Series, and for no more than 20 minutes at a time. Please see the user guide for instructions on swapping the rear battery correctly. 7. VIVE Desk is accessible within VIVE Hub on PC. System requirements must be met. PC required. Visual quality of VR/MR content is dependent on PC specs, software settings, and network connection. 8. VIVE Ultimate Trackers sold separately. Content compatibility required. 9. MicroSD card not included. 10. Wi-Fi 6E support is country dependent. For more details visit manufacturer's support site. 11. 120 Hz PC VR support via DisplayPort mode coming by end of 2024. 12. Glasses must be able to fit within the 150 mm wide facial interface, and the gasket spacer included in the box may need to be attached to the headset to provide sufficient depth. In some cases, the wide version of the gasket spacer may be needed. Availability varies by region. 13. All battery claim results will vary. Battery life and charge cycles vary by use. 14. VIVE Wired Streaming Kit supports VIVE Focus Vision headset. System requirements must be met. VR‑ready PC required. VR headset and VR/MR titles each sold separately. Visual quality and low latency of VR/MR content is dependent on PC specs, software settings, and network connection.
